schema.title: Selection

enabled.title: Enable
enabled.description: If this is deactivated, the config shall have no effect

key.title: Key
key.description: a unique idientifier, that can be used to reference this config

scaleMaster.title: Scale Master (optional)
scaleMaster.description: A Key of another chart from which the scale should be inherited

autoShrinkToMatchMaster.title: Auto Shrink
autoShrinkToMatchMaster.description: Shrink the chart if it doesn't need the full space

scaleFixedPositive.title: Scale Fixed Positive
scaleFixedPositive.description: Maximum positive Value of the Scale

scaleFixedNegative.title: Scale Fixed Negative
scaleFixedNegative.description: Maximum negative Value of the Scale

synchronizeScale.title: Enable Shared Scale
synchronizeScale.description: Enable shared scale for easier comparison

enabled.title: Enable
enabled.description: If this is deactivated, the config shall have no effect

negativeDeviationIsGood.title: Invert Deviation Color
negativeDeviationIsGood.description: If enabled negative deviations are colored with the good color and positive ones with the bad color.

waterfallElementType.title: Waterfall Element Type
waterfallElementType.description: The type of the waterfall, in manual waterfall mode

waterfallManualSpanTarget.title: Manual Span Target
waterfallManualSpanTarget.description: Overwrites the target of the span. Select the categories to which the span should go.

schema.title: Deviations
schema.description: Adds calculated members to the data set representing absolute or percent deviations between two existing ones

enabled.title: Enable
enabled.description: If this is deactivated, the config shall have no effect

deviationMemberKey.title: New Member Key
deviationMemberKey.description: The key of the new calculated member

deviationMemberName.title: New Member Name
deviationMemberName.description: The name of the new calculated member

deviationType.title: Type
deviationType.description: Absolute deviations describe the variance between subtrahend and minuend value in absolute numbers while percent ones describe the relative increase or decrease of the subtrahend member

targetDimension.title: Target Dimension
targetDimension.description: The dimension for which the new member should be calculated

minuendMember.title: Minuend Member
minuendMember.description: The name of the member which is the 'minuend' in the deviation calculation: minuend - subtrahend

subtrahendMember.title: Subtrahend Member
subtrahendMember.description: The name of the member which is the 'subtrahend' in the deviation calculation: minuend - subtrahend

memberName.title: New Member Name

expression.title: Expression

schema.title: N + Rest
schema.description: Add configurations to rank and filter members, show only the top/bottom ones and aggregate the rest

enabled.title: Enable
enabled.description: Enables the calculation of n top/bottom + rest members

relationId.title: Relation Id
relationId.description: An id that can be shared by multiple DataSelections to implement a relation

mode.title: Mode
mode.description: Determine the ranking mode top or bottom

n.title: Number n of top/bottom members
n.description: Number of top/bottom members (excluding the rest member)

targetDimension.title: Target Dimension
targetDimension.description: Dimension on whose members the n + rest transformation is performed

addressSubset.description: Specify a target dimension subset on which the top/bottom determination is based on. Use this property for example to only include specific keyfigures in the ranking
addressSubset.title: Target Dimension Filter

memberName.title: Rest Member Name (optional)
memberName.description: Specify a member name for the rest member of the target dimension.

description.title: Description (optional)
description.description: Short name that describes this configuration to be recognizable

memberKeys.title: Members

enabled.title: Enable
enabled.description: If this is deactivated, the config shall have no effect

calculateAggregateForExplicitHierarchies.title: Calculate Aggregation For Explicit Hierarchies
calculateAggregateForExplicitHierarchies.description: If true, Aggregations for explicit Hierarchies will be calculated

aggregationMemberKey.title: New Member Key

schema.title: Aggregation Type
schema.description: The type of aggregation that is applied to the rows

schema.title: Overall Node Name
schema.description: The name of the aggregation root node

schema.title: Arrange Totals at the End
schema.description: Switches the position of the sums between leading and following result nodes.

schema.title: Initial Expand Level
schema.description: Sets a hierarchy level threshold. All nodes of an hierarchy level higher than this threshold are initially expanded. Hierarchy levels are positive numbers where 0 represents the highest level

schema.title: Minimum Category Width
schema.description: Limits how small Categories can get in pixel.

schema.title: Maximum Category Width
schema.description: Limits how large Categories can get in pixel.

schema.title: Additional Axes
schema.description: Creates new axes alongside the default 'rows' and 'columns' axes for a more than 2-dimensional data projection and moves dimensions from columns or rows to the new ones.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: If this is deactivated, the config shall have no effect

axisKey.title: Identifier
axisKey.description: A unique identifier that is used to reference this axis

axisName.title: Name
axisName.description: The name of the Axis that should be created

axisDimensions.title: Dimensions
axisDimensions.description: A list of dimensions that should be moved to this axis

schema.title: Maximum Number of Data Points
schema.description: Limits the Number of Data Points for the chartrix to display. Exceeding the limit will result in the chartrix just showing a message that informs the user.

schema.title: Remove Dimensions
schema.description: Remove not needed Dimensions from the Metadata

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: The name of the new calculated member

targetDimension.title: Dimension
targetDimension.description: The Dimension that should be removed

schema.description: Definition of scenarios which can be referenced in other properties by using their id

fillPattern.pattern:
<pattern id="filled" patternUnits="userSpaceOnUse" width="4" height="4" fill="white">
      <rect width="4" height="4"/>
    </pattern>

<pattern id="filled" patternUnits="userSpaceOnUse" width="4" height="4" fill="white">
      <rect width="4" height="4"/>
    </pattern>

<pattern id="empty" patternUnits="userSpaceOnUse" width="4" height="4" fill="black">
      <rect width="4" height="4"/>
    </pattern>

<pattern id="hatchedUp" patternUnits="userSpaceOnUse" width="4" height="4">
      <path d="M-1,1 l2,-2 M0,4 l4,-4 M3,5 l2,-2" stroke="white" stroke-width="1" />
    </pattern>

id.title: Id
id.description: Unique Case Insensitive Identifier of a Scenario

fillPattern.title: Fill Pattern
fillPattern.description: SVG Fill Pattern string used as Mask

default.pattern:
<pattern id="filled" patternUnits="userSpaceOnUse" width="4" height="4" fill="white">
      <rect width="4" height="4"/>
    </pattern>

barWidth.title: Bar Width
barWidth.description: Relative Width of Bars in Relation to the Category Width (0...1)

pinWidth.title: Pin Width
pinWidth.description: Relative Width of Pins in Relation to the Category Width (0...1)

schema.description: Assigns scenarios to all data points or to a part of the data set only

enabled.title: Enable
enabled.description: If this is deactivated, the config shall have no effect

scenarioId.title: Scenario Id
scenarioId.description: identifier of the scenario that gets assigned to the data points selected by the filter

subChartKeys.title: Sub Charts
subChartKeys.description: Sub Charts for which the scenario assignment is applied to. None means for all.

addressSubset.description: Restricts this configuration to only affect data points matching all constraints
addressSubset.title: Filter

description.title: Description (optional)
description.description: Short name that describes this configuration to be recognizable

relationId.title: Relation Id
relationId.description: An id that can be shared by multiple DataSelections to implement a relation

schema.description: Title Text

schema.title: Enable
schema.description: Enable Title

schema.title: Visualisation Comment
schema.description: Representation of Visualisation Comment

schema.title: Bind to Instance
schema.description: Bind Visualisation Comment to Instance

schema.title: Size
schema.description: Size of normal text in matrix cells

schema.title: Family
schema.description: Font family of all text of the matrix

schema.title: Color
schema.description: Font color of all text of the matrix

schema.title: Value Format Assignment
schema.description: Assigns value format configurations to all cells or only a part of the data set

enabled.title: Enable
enabled.description: If this is deactivated, the config shall have no effect

addressSubset.description: Restricts this configuration to only affect data points matching all constraints
addressSubset.title: Filter

localeId.title: Locale
localeId.description: Defines the locale used for formatting values. The locale setting affects separator signs and abbreviation notation

format.title: Format Type
format.description: Defines the format mode used for formatting values

abbreviation.title: Abbreviations
abbreviation.description: Sets the way of finding the best suitable abbreviation for each value

thousandSeparator.title: Thousand Separator
thousandSeparator.description: When enabled, this character is used to restrain groups of a thousand. When not enabled the character defined by the locale is used

decimalSeparator.title: Decimal Separator
decimalSeparator.description: When enabled, this character is used to separate the integer part of a number from its fractional part. When not enabled, the character defined by the locale is used

totalDigits.title: Total Digits (approx.)
totalDigits.description: When enabled, the value is formatted so its overall amount of digits is approximately this number and the option 'fractional digits' has no effect. If not enabled, this option has no effect

fractionalDigits.title: Decimal Digits
fractionalDigits.description: The value is formatted so its amount of fractional digits matches this number. If not defined, this option has no effect

scalingFactor.title: Scaling Factor
scalingFactor.description: The value gets multiplied by this number

prefix.title: Prefix
prefix.description: This string gets prepended to the value

suffix.title: Suffix
suffix.description: This string gets appended to the value

zeroOutput.title: Zero Format
zeroOutput.description: When enabled, this string gets used for displaying zero values. If not enabled, zero labels get formatted by using the options of this value format configuration

nullOutput.title: Null Format
nullOutput.description: This string gets used for displaying null (non existing) values

infinityOutput.title: Infinity Format
infinityOutput.description: This string gets used for displaying values which are results of undefined or failed arithmetic operations like dividing by zero

roundingMethod.title: Rounding Method
roundingMethod.description: Defines the way values get rounded

negativeSign.title: Negative Sign
negativeSign.description: Defines how negative signs are displayed

explicitPositiveSign.title: Explicit Positive Sign
explicitPositiveSign.description: When enabled, positive numbers will be displayed with a positive sign. By default positive numbers are shown without any sign

units.title: Time Units
units.description: Configures units (e.g. hour and day) used for format type 'Time'. Should start with the largest unit and end with the smallest one while the modulus of the smallest one is relative to the input value.

modulus.title: Modulus
modulus.description: Modulus of the next smallest unit (in the sense of modular arithmetic). Common moduli are 24 hours a day or 8 hours a (work-)day. The modulus property of the smallest unit is relative to the actual raw input value.

prefix.title: Prefix
prefix.description: This string gets prepended to the duration part

suffix.title: Suffix
suffix.description: This string gets appended to the duration part

omitIfZero.title: Omit if Zero
omitIfZero.description: If activated, this part won't be included in the final formatted value when its value is zero

leadingZeros.title: Leading Zeros
leadingZeros.description: If activated, the unit's value gets prepended with as many zeros as needed to reach the integer digit count of the maximum value possible for the unit. Otherwise, leading zeros won't be displayed.

description.title: Description
description.description: Short name that describes this unit to be recognizable

description.title: Description (optional)
description.description: Short name that describes this configuration to be recognizable

relationId.title: Relation Id
relationId.description: An id that can be shared by multiple DataSelections to implement a relation

schema.title: Label Collision Allowance in Pixel
schema.description: Amount of Pixels the bounding box of labels should be reduced when comparing occupancies

schema.title: Colliding Category Label Strategy

css.title: CSS
css.description: A collection of CSS rules which should be executed by the browser

schema.title: XFL Rules
schema.description: The cell formatting language enables you to write powerful scripts to conditionally alter the chartrix

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: if enabled, the rule is active and gets applied to cells of the matrix

name.description: the name of this rule for making it recognizable

script.title: Script Body
script.description: the JavaScript code of this rule that gets executed in the context of each rendered cell of the matrix

schema.title: XFL Variables
schema.description: A List of user defined variables that are accessible in the CFL by using 'getCflVariable'. The value of CFL variables has to be a valid JSON value (e.g. 5 or "center" or [1,2,3] or null or {"foo": "bar"})

key.title: Identifier
key.description: A unique identifier that is used to reference this variable in the XFL

value.title: Value
value.description: The Value of the variable, represented in JSON notation. E.g. "car" for a string, or 3.14159 for a number
